hooks.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to set frontApp to name of first application process whose frontmost is true' -e 'if frontApp is not in {"Terminal", "iTerm2", "kitty", "Alacritty", "Ghostty", "wezterm-gui", "WezTerm", "Hyper", "Warp", "Rio", "Claude"} then' -e 'display notification "Claude Code response complete" with title "Claude Code"' -e 'end if'
